### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>checkpoint-restore/go-criu (github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/v8)</summary>

### [`v8.3.0`](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/releases/tag/v8.3.0)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/compare/v8.2.0...v8.3.0)

#### What's Changed

- build(deps): bump golang.org/x/sys from 0.40.0 to 0.41.0 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​235](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/235)
- test: fix gosec G703 path traversal warnings by [@​adrianreber](https://redirect.github.com/adrianreber) in [#​238](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/238)
- build(deps): bump dorny/paths-filter from 3 to 4 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​237](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/237)
- ci: pass PATH through sudo to use setup-go Go version by [@​adrianreber](https://redirect.github.com/adrianreber) in [#​239](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/239)
- ci: use go-version stable in codecov workflow by [@​adrianreber](https://redirect.github.com/adrianreber) in [#​240](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/240)
- build(deps): bump golang.org/x/sys from 0.41.0 to 0.42.0 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​236](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/236)
- build(deps): bump DavidAnson/markdownlint-cli2-action from 22 to 23 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​242](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/242)
- build(deps): bump codecov/codecov-action from 5 to 6 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​241](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/241)
- build(deps): bump golang.org/x/sys from 0.42.0 to 0.43.0 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​243](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/243)
- build(deps): bump golang.org/x/sys from 0.43.0 to 0.45.0 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​245](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/245)
- rpc, stats: switch to protobuf-go-lite by [@​kolyshkin](https://redirect.github.com/kolyshkin) in [#​246](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/246)
- build(deps): bump golang.org/x/sys from 0.45.0 to 0.46.0 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​248](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/248)

**Full Changelog**: <https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/compare/v8.2.0...v8.3.0>

</details>
